overview.description: The PIMCO Inflation PLUS Active ETF (PCPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking real returns through exposure to investment-grade, inflation-indexed bonds issued by US and global governments. The fund aims to maintain an ultra-short duration profile. PCPI was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by PIMCO.

data.title: PIMCO Launches New Inflation-linked ETF
data.text: NEWPORT BEACH, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PIMCO, a global leader in active fixed income with deep expertise across public and private markets, is expanding its exchange-traded fund offerings with the la...
